import sys
import tty
import termios

# 模拟 confirm_write 函数中的选项渲染逻辑
options = ['是', '否']
selected = 0

print\(\)
print\('  ⚠️  检测到写入文件请求: test.txt'\)
print\('  是否允许写入？'\)

# 打印初始选项
for i, option in enumerate\(options\):
    if i == selected:
        print\(f'  \\033[1;32m➤ {option}\\033[0m'\)
    else:
        print\('     ' + option\)  # 5个空格

print\(\)
print\('--- 显示完成，检查对齐 ---'\)
print\(\)
print\('期望效果:'\)
print\('  ➤ 是  \(选中状态，绿色\)'\)
print\('     否  \(未选中，5个空格缩进\)'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import sys
import tty
import termios

options = ['是', '否']
selected = 0

print\(\)
print\('  ⚠️  检测到写入文件请求: test.txt'\)
print\('  是否允许写入？\(按 ↑↓ 选择，Enter 确认，q 退出\)'\)
print\(\)

fd = sys.stdin.fileno\(\)
old_settings = termios.tcgetattr\(fd\)

def render_options\(\):
    output = ''
    for i, option in enumerate\(options\):
        output += '\\r\\033[K'
        if i == selected:
            output += f'  \\033[1;32m➤ {option}\\033[0m'
        else:
            output += '     ' + option
        output += '\\n'
    output += f'\\033[{len\(options\)}A'
    sys.stdout.write\(output\)
    sys.stdout.flush\(\)

try:
    tty.setraw\(fd\)
    
    # 初始渲染
    for i, option in enumerate\(options\):
        if i == selected:
            print\(f'  \\033[1;32m➤ {option}\\033[0m'\)
        else:
            print\('     ' + option\)
    print\(f'\\033[{len\(options\)}A', end=''\)
    sys.stdout.flush\(\)
    
    while True:
        ch = sys.stdin.read\(1\)
        if ch == '\\x1b':
            ch2 = sys.stdin.read\(1\)
            if ch2 == '[':
                ch3 = sys.stdin.read\(1\)
                if ch3 == 'A':
                    selected = \(selected - 1\) % len\(options\)
                    render_options\(\)
                elif ch3 == 'B':
                    selected = \(selected + 1\) % len\(options\)
                    render_options\(\)
        elif ch == '\\r' or ch == '\\n':
            print\(f'\\033[{len\(options\)}B', end=''\)
            print\(\)
            break
        elif ch == 'q' or ch == '\\x03':
            print\(f'\\033[{len\(options\)}B', end=''\)
            print\('\\n  已取消\\n'\)
            sys.exit\(0\)
finally:
    termios.tcsetattr\(fd, termios.TCSADRAIN, old_settings\)

print\(f'  你选择了: {options[selected]}'\)
")

Bash(cat << 'EOF'
# 测试脚本：查看按键发送的转义序列
# 运行后按 Shift+Enter，然后按 Ctrl+C 退出

import sys
import tty
import termios

print\("请按 Shift+Enter，然后按 Ctrl+C 退出..."\)
print\(\)

fd = sys.stdin.fileno\(\)
old_settings = termios.tcgetattr\(fd\)
try:
    tty.setraw\(fd\)
    while True:
        ch = sys.stdin.read\(1\)
        # 显示字符的十六进制值
        print\(f"字符: {repr\(ch\)}  十六进制: {hex\(ord\(ch\)\)}"\)
except KeyboardInterrupt:
    pass
finally:
    termios.tcsetattr\(fd, termios.TCSADRAIN, old_settings\)
    print\("\\n测试结束"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 -c "
import asyncio
from my_agent.permissions import can_use_tool, confirm_write
from claude_agent_sdk.types import ToolPermissionContext

print\('=== can_use_tool 功能测试 ==='\)
print\(\)

async def test_permissions\(\):
    context = ToolPermissionContext\(\)
    
    # 测试写入工具的参数匹配
    test_cases = [
        # \(工具名, 参数, 预期是否触发写入确认\)
        \('write_file', {'file_path': './my_project/test.txt'}, True\),
        \('Write', {'path': './my_project/test.txt'}, True\),
        \('mcp__write_file', {'filename': './my_project/test.txt'}, True\),
        \('bash', {'command': 'ls'}, False\),
        \('read_file', {'file_path': './test.txt'}, False\),
    ]
    
    for tool_name, args, should_trigger_write in test_cases:
        print\(f'工具: {tool_name}, 参数: {args}'\)
        result = await can_use_tool\(tool_name, args, context\)
        result_type = type\(result\).__name__
        
        if should_trigger_write:
            # 写入工具会触发 confirm_write，但由于是非交互式环境会失败
            print\(f'  -> 这会触发写入确认对话框'\)
        else:
            print\(f'  -> 结果: {result_type}'\)
        print\(\)
    
    print\('✓ 工具名称匹配逻辑测试完成'\)
    print\(\)
    
    # 测试权限模式的设置
    from my_agent.cli import ClaudeAgentOptions
    print\('=== ClaudeAgentOptions 配置测试 ==='\)
    print\(\)
    
    # 检查 can_use_tool 是否被正确导入
    from my_agent import cli
    print\(f'can_use_tool 函数已导入: {hasattr\(cli, \\"can_use_tool\\"\)}'\)
    
    # 模拟创建 options
    options = ClaudeAgentOptions\(
        permission_mode='default',
        cwd='./my_project',
        allowed_tools=['bash', 'read_file', 'write_file'],
        can_use_tool=can_use_tool,
    \)
    print\(f'permission_mode: {options.permission_mode}'\)
    print\(f'can_use_tool 已设置: {options.can_use_tool is not None}'\)
    print\(\)
    print\('✓ ClaudeAgentOptions 配置测试完成'\)

asyncio.run\(test_permissions\(\)\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import os
import re

# 测试图片标签替换逻辑
from my_agent.input import add_image, get_image_path, reset_image_counter

# 重置并添加测试图片
reset_image_counter\(\)

# 添加一个测试图片路径
test_path = '/Users/shenhong/Desktop/screenshot_to_read.png'
num = add_image\(test_path\)
print\(f'添加图片: {test_path} -> 编号 {num}'\)

# 测试获取路径
retrieved = get_image_path\(1\)
print\(f'获取图片路径: {retrieved}'\)

# 测试标签替换
test_prompt = '[image1] 帮我提取里面的文字'
pattern = r'\\[image\(\\d+\)\\]'

def replace_image_tag\(match\):
    image_num = int\(match.group\(1\)\)
    image_path = get_image_path\(image_num\)
    if image_path:
        return f'[Image: source: {image_path}]'
    return match.group\(0\)

result = re.sub\(pattern, replace_image_tag, test_prompt\)
print\(f'替换后: {result}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import os
import base64
import mimetypes

# 测试图片编码函数
def encode_image_to_base64\(file_path\):
    mime_type, _ = mimetypes.guess_type\(file_path\)
    if not mime_type:
        mime_type = 'image/png'
    with open\(file_path, 'rb'\) as f:
        image_data = f.read\(\)
    base64_str = base64.b64encode\(image_data\).decode\('utf-8'\)
    return base64_str, mime_type

# 测试一个存在的图片
test_image = '/Users/shenhong/go/source/my-agent/my_project/.images/screenshot_to_read.png'
if os.path.exists\(test_image\):
    base64_data, mime_type = encode_image_to_base64\(test_image\)
    print\(f'图片存在: {test_image}'\)
    print\(f'MIME类型: {mime_type}'\)
    print\(f'Base64长度: {len\(base64_data\)}'\)
    print\(f'Base64前100字符: {base64_data[:100]}...'\)
else:
    print\(f'图片不存在: {test_image}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import asyncio
from prompt_toolkit import Application
from prompt_toolkit.layout.containers import Window, HSplit
from prompt_toolkit.layout.controls import FormattedTextControl, BufferControl
from prompt_toolkit.layout.layout import Layout
from prompt_toolkit.key_binding import KeyBindings
from prompt_toolkit.buffer import Buffer
from prompt_toolkit.styles import Style
import os

async def test\(\):
    width = 80
    try:
        width = os.get_terminal_size\(\).columns
    except:
        pass
    separator = '─' * width
    
    kb = KeyBindings\(\)
    
    @kb.add\('enter'\)
    def _\(event\):
        event.app.exit\(result=event.current_buffer.text\)
    
    @kb.add\('c-c'\)
    def _\(event\):
        event.app.exit\(\)
    
    buffer = Buffer\(\)
    
    style = Style.from_dict\({
        'separator': 'ansibrightblack',
    }\)
    
    root = HSplit\([
        Window\(content=FormattedTextControl\(lambda: [\('class:separator', separator\)]\), height=1\),
        Window\(content=BufferControl\(buffer=buffer\), height=1, get_line_prefix=lambda *_: '❯ '\),
        Window\(content=FormattedTextControl\(lambda: [\('class:separator', separator\)]\), height=1\),
    ]\)
    
    app = Application\(layout=Layout\(root\), key_bindings=kb, style=style, full_screen=False\)
    result = await app.run_async\(\)
    print\(f'你输入的是: {result}'\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1 || echo "测试完成")

Bash(python3 -c "
import asyncio
from src.my_agent.task_manager import task_manager, TaskStatus

# 测试任务管理器
print\('=== 测试任务管理器 ==='\)
print\(\)

# 创建任务
task1 = task_manager.create_task\(
    subject='实现用户认证',
    description='添加用户登录、注册和密码重置功能',
    activeForm='正在实现用户认证'
\)
print\(f'✓ 创建任务 #{task1.id}: {task1.subject}'\)

task2 = task_manager.create_task\(
    subject='编写单元测试',
    description='为认证模块编写测试用例',
    activeForm='正在编写单元测试'
\)
print\(f'✓ 创建任务 #{task2.id}: {task2.subject}'\)

# 设置依赖关系
task_manager.update_task\(task2.id, addBlockedBy=[task1.id]\)
print\(f'✓ 任务 #{task2.id} 依赖 #{task1.id}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 当前任务列表 ==='\)
for task in task_manager.list_tasks\(\):
    status_emoji = '⏳' if task.status == TaskStatus.PENDING else '🔄' if task.status == TaskStatus.IN_PROGRESS else '✅'
    deps = f' \(等待: #{task.blockedBy[0]}\)' if task.blockedBy else ''
    print\(f'  {status_emoji} #{task.id}: {task.subject}{deps}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 更新任务状态 ==='\)
task_manager.update_task\(task1.id, status='in_progress'\)
print\(f'✓ 任务 #{task1.id} 状态: in_progress'\)

# 检查任务2是否可以开始
can_start = task_manager.can_start_task\(task2.id\)
print\(f'✓ 任务 #{task2.id} 可以开始? {can_start}'\)

# 完成任务1
task_manager.update_task\(task1.id, status='completed'\)
print\(f'✓ 任务 #{task1.id} 状态: completed'\)

can_start = task_manager.can_start_task\(task2.id\)
print\(f'✓ 任务 #{task2.id} 可以开始? {can_start}'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 最终任务状态 ==='\)
for task in task_manager.list_tasks\(\):
    status_emoji = '⏳' if task.status == TaskStatus.PENDING else '🔄' if task.status == TaskStatus.IN_PROGRESS else '✅'
    print\(f'  {status_emoji} #{task.id}: {task.subject} - {task.status.value}'\)

print\(\)
print\('✅ 所有测试通过!'\)
")
